relationships: ber:D ayen yessewhamen mi ara nẓer dakken imedɣan deg yiḍ i ttilin d urmiden
ber:Tazikkent n yiɣersiwen n yiḍ i d-yellan deg ulemsiw tessewhem Adriano
ber:Aṭas n yiɣersiwen ay yettilin d urmiden deg yiḍ
ber:Ziri yezmer ad yesmeskir tamaziɣt yal ass, deg yiḍ, deg wass
ber:Flavio yeqqel-d deg tɣellist yernu uqbel ad d-yeɣli yiḍ
